description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that automates building and releasing Android File Transfer for Linux on Linux and macOS platforms. Trigger on push events. For Linux, use an ubuntu-22.04 environment to install dependencies, configure, build, and install the application, then create an AppImage. For macOS, use a macos-13 environment to install dependencies, configure, build, and install the application, then create a DMG file. Upload artifacts to releases for both platforms.
